message:
fix(web): equalize splits using weight-based ratio like Ghostty

Instead of setting all ratios to 0.5, calculate the ratio based on
the number of leaf panels on each side. This ensures 3 columns get
33%/33%/33% instead of 50%/25%/25%.

For example, with panels A|B|C:
- First split: weight_left=1, weight_right=2, ratio=1/3
- Second split: weight_left=1, weight_right=1, ratio=1/2
Result: A=33%, B=33%, C=33%
